parsed.production_notes: Entirely AI-generated. The main character is a cyborg, and the background figures are perfectly static with uncanny, unblinking faces. The lip-syncing is also slightly unnatural.

characters.appearance: Young woman, medium complexion, dark hair in a bun, dark-rimmed glasses. Her head is human, but her body is a detailed robotic suit.
characters.wardrobe: White and silver robotic exoskeleton with blue glowing accents.

scenes.setting: Recording studio, wood-paneled walls, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with a human head and a white, silver, and blue robotic body stands before a black studio microphone. She wears dark-rimmed glasses and has her hair in a bun. Behind her, several young men stand completely motionless against a wood-paneled wall. The lighting is bright, highlighting the metallic details of her suit. The camera frames her from the waist up.

scenes.visual_description: A cyborg woman speaks into a microphone in a recording studio setting. Several static men stand in the background. The shot remains a continuous medium close-up throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: दो हफ्ते। सिर्फ दो हफ्ते। [Two weeks. Just two weeks.]
Character A says: इतने में तुम इंस्टाग्राम पे 28 घंटे वेस्ट कर दोगे। [In this time you will waste 28 hours on Instagram.]
Character A says: पर अगर वही दो हफ्ते में रोज़ 15 मिनट मेरे साथ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर लो, [But if in those same two weeks you practice English with me for 15 minutes daily,]
Character A says: तो मे एंड तक तुम फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोल सकते हो। चॉइस तुम्हारी है। [then by the end of May you can speak fluent English. The choice is yours.]
Character A says: देखो, इंग्लिश सीखना मुश्किल नहीं है, मुश्किल है शुरू करना। [Look, learning English is not difficult, starting is difficult.]
Character A says: तो आज शुरू करो। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So start today. Download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: दो हफ्ते का चैलेंज लो। रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट। [Take the two-week challenge. Just 15 minutes daily.]
Character A says: पहला हफ्ता, एक्सपर्ट्स के वीडियो देखो। [First week, watch experts' videos.]
Character A says: स्पोकन इंग्लिश शो है, हिंदी में समझा के इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [It's a spoken English show, they teach how to speak English by explaining in Hindi.]
Character A says: बेसिक से स्टार्ट होगा। हेलो, थैंक यू, एक्सक्यूज़ मी, यहाँ से। [It will start from the basics. Hello, thank you, excuse me, from here.]
Character A says: छोटे दो-पांच मिनट के वीडियो। [Short two-five minute videos.]
Character A says: इतने आसान कि लगेगा, ये तो मुझे भी आ सकता है। [So easy that you'll feel, even I can learn this.]
Character A says: दूसरा हफ्ता, मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करो। [Second week, practice with me.]
Character A says: मैं तुम्हारी एआई कोच हूँ। 24 घंटे अवेलेबल हूँ। [I am your AI coach. I am available 24 hours.]
Character A says: सुबह 5 बजे भी, रात के 12 बजे भी। [Even at 5 AM, even at 12 midnight.]
Character A says: जो एक्सपर्ट के वीडियो में सीखा, वो मुझसे बोल के प्रैक्टिस करो। [Whatever you learned in the expert's video, practice speaking it with me.]
Character A says: गलत बोलोगे, मैं सुधार दूँगी। [If you speak wrong, I will correct it.]
Character A says: प्रोनंसिएशन गलत है, पकड़ लूँगी। टेंस गलत लगाया, बता दूँगी। [If pronunciation is wrong, I'll catch it. If you use the wrong tense, I'll tell you.]
Character A says: 100 बार गलत बोलो, 100 बार सुधार दूँगी। [Speak wrong 100 times, I will correct it 100 times.]
Character A says: कभी हँसूँगी नहीं। कभी जज नहीं करूँगी। [I will never laugh. I will never judge.]
Character A says: कभी नहीं बोलूँगी इतना भी नहीं आता तुम्हें। [I will never say you don't even know this much.]
Character A says: और सबसे बड़ी बात, किसी स्ट्रेंजर से बात नहीं करनी। [And the biggest thing, you don't have to talk to any stranger.]
Character A says: किसी अजनबी के सामने गलत इंग्लिश बोल के शर्माना नहीं है। [You don't have to feel shy speaking wrong English in front of a stranger.]
Character A says: तुम और मैं। बस। [You and me. That's it.]
Character A says: प्राइवेट, सेफ, तुम्हारी स्पीड से। [Private, safe, at your speed.]
Character A says: 14 दिन में क्या होगा? इंग्लिश परफेक्ट नहीं होगी, झूठ नहीं बोलूँगी। [What will happen in 14 days? English won't be perfect, I won't lie.]
Character A says: पर इतना होगा कि तुम बोल पाओगे। [But it will be enough that you will be able to speak.]
Character A says: बिना रुके, बिना डरे, बिना शर्माए। [Without stopping, without fear, without shying away.]
Character A says: और वही काफी है शुरू करने के लिए। [And that is enough to start.]
Character A says: एक्सपर्ट सिखाएं, मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करो। [Experts teach, practice with me.]
Character A says: ट्रायल सिर्फ 1 रुपये। नो बहाना। सिर्फ प्रैक्टिस। [Trial for just 1 Rupee. No excuses. Just practice.]
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Download the English Seekho app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically in the center of the frame against a solid light purple background. Below the phone is a rounded rectangular button.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone mockup is shown on a purple background, displaying the app logo. An install button is below it. A long disclaimer text appears on a black background at the very end.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English Seekho
INSTALL NOW
